title: Just Katanas
description: Adds katanas that are faster than swords with a small extra expense!
body:
# Overview

Adds katanas as an alternative to swords. Katanas have more durability and a higher attack speed than swords, but require an extra 2 iron nuggets to slightly increase the cost of their recipes.

# Katanas:
- Wooden Katana
- Stone Katana
- Iron Katana
- Gold Katana
- Diamond Katana
- Netherite Katana

## Specialty Katanas
- Dragon Katana
- Blazing Katana
- Starlight Katana
- Hurricane Katana

All Recipes are shown in the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-katanas/gallery)

# Advancements

- Faster Than Swords: Obtain any Katana

- Slicing Winds: Obtain a Hurricane Katana

- Who's On Fire Now?: Obtain a Blazing Katana

- Power of the Last Generation: Obtain a Dragon Katana

- Stary Origins: Obtain a Starlight Katana
